text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami? Are you feverish? Have you eaten
anything strange recently?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
N-no! I didn't eat at all! I'm actually starving right
now!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I've been too busy making this really big cake for
your special day—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Please, forget everything I just said! If you know
about the surprise, it won't be a surprise!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh nooo! I wanted to be all elegant like you and lead you to it discreetly, but I ruined it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So you revealed a little surprise or two—why
would I be disappointed by that?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You made such an effort to celebrate my
birthday... That's the most wonderful surprise of
all.
